# Highlight.js Vendor Assets

Vendored from `@highlightjs/cdn-assets` version `11.11.1`.

- `highlight.min.js` is the official browser core/common build.
- `languages/*.min.js` contains every official language module published in the package.
- `all-languages.min.js` concatenates and minifies `highlight.min.js` and every file in `languages/` for the embedded Gitomi web UI.
- `LICENSE` is the upstream BSD-3-Clause license.

Gitomi-local language extensions live outside this directory under `cli/src/web/highlight/`.
